text.title: Solo Late-Fee Clause Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft-07) for `LateFeeClauseSpec` — late-fee tiered schedule + 14-day pause right + re-engagement fee + jurisdiction review citation.

list.item: `late_fee_tiers` has flat single-rate without escalation — violates `r2-late-fee-tiered`.
`clause_text` shorter than 100 chars OR delivered only via email — violates `r1-clause-in-sow-not-email`.

example.code: { "spec_id": "us-CA-2026-v3", "jurisdiction": "US-CA", "header": {"owner": {"role": "freelancer", "person": "alex"}, "last_reviewed": "2026-05-10", "version": "3.0"}, "late_fee_tiers": [ {"after_days": 14, "rate_pct_per_month": 1.5}, {"after_days": 30, "rate_pct_per_month": 3.0}, {"after_days": 60, "rate_pct_per_month": 5.0} ], "pause_days": 14, "re_engagement_fee_usd": 500, "jurisdiction_review": {"reviewed_by": "counsel-handle", "reviewed_at": "2026-02-10", "memo_link": "drive://legal/us-ca-late-fee-v3.pdf"}, "clause_text": "Late payment fees: invoices unpaid beyond 14 days accrue a 1.5%/month fee. After 30 days, 3.0%/month. After 60 days, 5.0%/month. Pause right: Vendor may suspend work after 14 days unpaid with 5-business-day notice. Re-engagement: $500 paid in advance to resume." }

example.note: Pause < 14 days; flat single-tier fee; re-engagement fee 0; no jurisdiction review; clause delivered "see email".
